description: EffortLoad carries PERCEIVED or DERIVED effort only (§5.13, v0.5 re-scope): RPE/RIR (perceived) and sRPE/TRIMP/TSS (derived load indices). NOT in scope here: relative RESISTANCE (%1RM → Load.value relativeToThreshold, §5.12); INTENSITY targets (power/pace/HR/zone, %FTP/%maxHR → Intensity, §5.13); bar velocity/VBT (→ Intensity dimension `speed`, or per-rep `velocity` §5.7). Tokens follow the spec's acronym casing. external/internal is the closed EffortLoad.kind, not part of this open vocabulary.
